cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24.2.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE CXX)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "   -fsigned-char -W -Wall -Wreturn-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Waddress -Wsequence-point -Wformat -Wformat-security -Wundef -Winit-self -Wpointer-arith -Wshadow -Wsign-promo -Wuninitialized -Wsuggest-override -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -Wimplicit-fallthrough=3 -Wno-strict-overflow -fdiagnostics-show-option -fomit-frame-pointer -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections  -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Wno-missing-declarations -Wno-unused-parameter")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE "-O3 -DNDEBUG  -DNDEBUG")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "  -Wl,--gc-sections")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
add_definitions([==[ -Wno-missing-prototypes]==])
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "/home/tsu/saki/notes/cs189a/OverSEA-remote-maintenance/client/depend/opencv-build/CMakeFiles/CMakeTmp")
add_executable(cmTC_0f273 "/home/tsu/saki/notes/cs189a/OverSEA-remote-maintenance/client/depend/opencv-build/CMakeFiles/CMakeTmp/src.cxx")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_0f273 PROPERTY "CXX_STANDARD" "11")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_0f273 PROPERTY "CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED" "TRUE")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_0f273 PROPERTY "CXX_EXTENSIONS" "OFF")
target_link_libraries(cmTC_0f273 ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
